indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: There are no cooking appliances such as a stove, oven, or microwave visible in the image.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: absence of hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present, which is required for all food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: absence of storage space
indicators.rationale: There is no visible storage space for food or kitchen supplies.

indicators.name: absence of seating
indicators.rationale: There is no seating area visible, which is necessary for preparing meals.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking activities. There are no cooking appliances, no water fixture, no hard prep surfaces, no storage space, and no seating area. The space is designed for office or meeting purposes, not for cooking.
